title: Car-related stocks take it on the chin, with declines of up to 25% in one day
text: U.S. stocks sold off again on Thursday, with CarMax and several vehicle manufacturers and parts makers among the worst performers.

title: 7 Large-Cap Sleeper Stocks to Buy Before Wall Street Wakes Up
text: Today, I want to consider some large-cap sleeper stocks to buy. If you were able to travel back in time one year ago, the current market environment might feel like a bad dream.

title: Tesla supplier Aptiv to buy 85% stake in Intercable unit in EV tech push
text: Tesla supplier Aptiv Plc said on Tuesday it would acquire a majority stake in a unit of Italy' Intercable for 595 million euros ($605.71 million), allowing the auto parts company access to technology used in electric vehicles (EVs).

title: Aptiv Signs Definitive Agreement to Acquire Industry-Leading Provider of High-Voltage Busbars and Interconnect Solutions
text: Acquisition of Intercable Automotive Solutions broadens Aptiv's portfolio of high-voltage system solutions DUBLIN , Sept. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener and more connected, announced today a definitive agreement to acquire an 85% equity stake in Intercable Automotive Solutions, a subsidiary of Intercable S.r.l.

title: 2 Auto Stocks to Buy for 2022 and Beyond
text: These two stocks are poised to thrive on the megatrend of electric and autonomous vehicles.

title: Aptiv to Present at the Morgan Stanley 10th Annual Laguna Conference
text: DUBLIN , Sept. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener, and more connected, will present at the Morgan Stanley 10th Annual Laguna Conference, September 14 at 2:35 p.m.
